titleJa: AgentOps は補助機能ではなく control layer として扱われ始める
titleEn: AgentOps is starting to be treated as a control layer rather than a helper feature
summaryJa: 2025年8月時点では、春から初夏にかけての Foundry・OpenAI・Google の発表を通じて、agent stack の競争が trace、review、observability、tool governance といった control layer に移り始めていた。
summaryEn: By August 2025, the spring-to-summer launch pattern across Microsoft, OpenAI, and Google suggested that competition in the agent stack was moving toward traces, reviews, observability, and tool governance as control layers.

publishedSources.label: RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
